docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-25-2015 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK AS TO DEFENDANT HO, JACK SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-07-2015
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF AUG-25-2015 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

DECLARATION IN SUPPORT RE: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING (TRANSACTION ID # 15215002) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK
